def get_code_snippet_complexity(code):
    # Calculate the complexity of the code snippet
    complexity = 0
    # Split the code into lines
    lines = code.splitlines()
    # Loop through each line
    for line in lines:
        # Check if the line contains a binary logical operator
        if re.search(r'\b(and|or)\b', line):
            complexity += 1
        # Check if the line contains a multiline if condition
        if re.search(r'\bif\b', line):
            complexity += 2
        # Check if the line contains both and/or and if
        if re.search(r'\b(and|or)\b', line) and re.search(r'\bif\b', line):
            complexity += 3
    return complexity

    # Calculate the complexity of the code snippet

    # Loop through each line
    for line in lines:

        # Check if the line contains a multiline if condition

        # Check if the line contains both and/or and if
        if re.search(r'\b(and|or)\b', line) and re.search(r'\bif\b', line):

    return complexity
